title: SecondFi traces Cardano wallet exploit to address-level issue
summary: SecondFi traces Cardano wallet exploit to address-level issue
briefing: Cardano wallet SecondFi traced the incident to an address-level issue and secured 129 million ADA after attackers drained funds from 374 addresses.

title: CBOE debuts prediction market with S&P 500 contracts
summary: CBOE debuts prediction market with S&P 500 contracts
briefing: Cboe launched its first prediction market product tied to the S&P 500 index, citing a growing investor demand for binary options contracts.

title: CryptoQuant warns on Strategy's dividend coverage as cash reserve falls 38%
summary: CryptoQuant warns on Strategy's dividend coverage as cash reserve falls 38%
briefing: Strategy's cash reserves are now enough to pay only 14 months of dividends from the previous seven-year level. CryptoQuant said the company should pause Bitcoin purchases and rebuild its reserves.

title: Aave positioned to capture tokenized asset growth in DeFi: Standard Chartered
summary: Aave positioned to capture tokenized asset growth in DeFi: Standard Chartered
briefing: Standard Chartered said tokenized assets moving into DeFi could drive deposits into Aave and help the protocol rebuild its position as a dominant onchain lending platform.

title: Strategy's MSTR may plunge 80% if it repeats this dot-com-era fractal
summary: Strategy's MSTR may plunge 80% if it repeats this dot-com-era fractal
briefing: Strategy’s cash reserve is down 38% as dividend obligations near $1.2 billion, raising dilution risk for MSTR shareholders.

title: BTC price four-year trend calls for $76K as analysis says Bitcoin 'not broken'
summary: BTC price four-year trend calls for $76K as analysis says Bitcoin 'not broken'
briefing: Bitcoin research said that BTC price action remained in tune with previous cycles as the bear market produces a 20% discount to its four-year "adoption structure" trend line.

title: South Korea adds token securities to capital market overhaul
summary: South Korea adds token securities to capital market overhaul
briefing: South Korea’s Financial Services Commission has placed token securities infrastructure within a wider capital-market modernization plan covering faster settlement, longer trading hours and digital transformation.

title: OpenPayd secures MiCA license as stablecoin adoption grows in Europe
summary: OpenPayd secures MiCA license as stablecoin adoption grows in Europe
briefing: OpenPayd, which provides infrastructure to companies including Kraken crypto exchange, can now offer regulated crypto services across Europe under MiCA.

title: Morning Minute: Meta Is Building a Prediction Market
summary: Morning Minute: Meta Is Building a Prediction Market
briefing: Arthur Hayes put out a bull case for the CARDS token, and the Clarity Act is facing some surprising opposition from a new group.

title: DOJ Seizes Huione Infrastructure Linked to Billions in Crypto Laundering
summary: DOJ Seizes Huione Infrastructure Linked to Billions in Crypto Laundering
briefing: The seizure hits a cloud account that powered Huione Guarantee, a Telegram marketplace tied to billions in Southeast Asian scam proceeds.

title: Farage Says He Can Spend Tether Billionaire’s $6.7M Gift ‘On Ferraris’ if He Wants
summary: Farage Says He Can Spend Tether Billionaire’s $6.7M Gift ‘On Ferraris’ if He Wants
briefing: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage called the gift from Christopher Harborne a “private matter” amid a standards investigation.

title: Meet Qwable: The Free Local Model That Thinks Like Claude Fable
summary: Meet Qwable: The Free Local Model That Thinks Like Claude Fable
briefing: Someone fine-tuned Fable 5's reasoning style into a local Qwen model. Then someone else removed its conscience.

title: Trump's Quantum Push Wins Praise, But Experts Warn Bitcoin Isn't Ready
summary: Trump's Quantum Push Wins Praise, But Experts Warn Bitcoin Isn't Ready
briefing: Industry leaders welcomed President Trump's quantum executive orders, while researchers said the accelerated timelines reflect growing urgency around post-quantum security and cryptocurrency infrastructure.

title: Crypto’s Clarity Act Has a New Enemy: Catholic Leaders
summary: Crypto’s Clarity Act Has a New Enemy: Catholic Leaders
briefing: A group of 82 Catholic leaders warned a key provision of the crypto bill, protecting software developers from prosecution, could enable human trafficking.

title: Mark Zuckerberg Wants a Prediction Market Too: NYT
summary: Mark Zuckerberg Wants a Prediction Market Too: NYT
briefing: The initiative follows bets on stablecoins and the metaverse.

title: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Cyber AI Beats Anthropic's Banned Mythos Model—And Nobody's Shutting It Down
summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Cyber AI Beats Anthropic's Banned Mythos Model—And Nobody's Shutting It Down
briefing: GPT-5.5-Cyber tops the CyberGym leaderboard as Anthropic's best models sit offline under a Trump administration export ban.
